title: 第 70 節
en: Ara, name of the eighteenth Tirthakara, 280.
Arishtanemi, name of the twentysecond Tirthakara, 276, Arithmetics, 221.
Aryagayanti, name of a Sàkhá, 288, Aryaghosha, 274.
Aryanagila, name of a Sakha, 288, Aryapadma, name of a Sakha, 293.
Aryapadmila, name of a Sakha, Aryarishipalita, name of a Sakha, Aryatapasi, name of a Sàkhá, 288, Aryavagra, name of a Sakha, 293.
Ascetic, compared to a warrior, — different kinds of, 128 n r.
